beak.experimental.cdr module

beak.experimental.cdr._download_cdr_files(download_url: str | Path, download_file_path: str | Path, verify_ssl: bool)[source]
beak.experimental.cdr._get_cma(json: str | Path, target='cma', payloads: str = 'payload') → DataFrame[source]

Extracts CMA data from a JSON file.

Parameters:

  • json (Union[str, Path]) – The path to the JSON file containing CMA data.

  • payloads (str) – The name of the payload column containing the CMA data.

Returns:

A DataFrame containing the CMA information.

Return type:

pd.DataFrame

beak.experimental.cdr._get_evidence_layers(json: str | Path, target='evidence_layers', payloads: str = 'payload') → DataFrame[source]

Extracts evidence layers from a JSON file.

Parameters:

  • json (Union[str, Path]) – The path to the JSON file containing evidence layers.

  • payloads (str) – The name of the payload column containing the evidence layers.

Returns:

A DataFrame containing the evidence layer information.

Return type:

pd.DataFrame

beak.experimental.cdr._zip_file_extract_core(file_path: str | Path, extract_to: str | Path)[source]
beak.experimental.cdr._zip_file_extract_run(extract_zip: bool, file_path: str | Path, extract_to: str | Path)[source]
beak.experimental.cdr.create_template_raster(cma: dict, path: str | Path, snap_to: Tuple[Number, Number] | None = None) → Tuple[ndarray, dict][source]

Creates a template raster using CMA data.

Parameters:

  • cma (dict) – The CMA data.

  • path (Union[str, Path]) – The path to save the template raster.

  • snap_to (Optional[Tuple[Number, Number]]) – The geographic x and y coordinates to snap the template raster to.

beak.experimental.cdr.download_evidence_layers(data: DataFrame, cma: dict, base_folder: str | Path = PosixPath('/beak-ta3/src/beak/data'), custom_cma_id: str | None = None, extract_zip: bool = True, verify_ssl: bool = True, ignore: List[str] | None = None)[source]
